title: sterculia khasiana
intro: Sterculia khasiana is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family and is commonly known as the Kashmir sterculia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. In traditional medicine, Sterculia khasiana is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
